cloudflow-platform.name: CloudFlow Platform
cloudflow-platform.portfolioMessage: The Complete Cloud Integration Platform for Modern Enterprises
cloudflow-platform.tagline: Connect every app, automate every workflow, scale without limits

campaignBrief.content:
CLOUDFLOW PLATFORM — Q2/Q3 2026 CAMPAIGN BRIEF

Campaign Name: Connect Everything. Automate Everything.
Campaign Period: April – September 2026
Quarter Theme: AI-First Integration — The Year Automation Becomes Standard

---

OBJECTIVE
Drive awareness of CloudFlow as the AI-native integration platform for enterprise IT, generate 1,200 qualified leads across North America and EMEA, and support a $4.2M pipeline target for H1 FY26.

---

TARGET AUDIENCE
Primary: IT Directors and Enterprise Architects at companies with 500+ employees and 100+ business applications
Secondary: CIOs and CTOs evaluating middleware consolidation or digital transformation initiatives
Buyer Personas: The Overloaded IT Director (backlog, cost pressure), The Visionary CIO (AI strategy, transformation mandate), The Platform Architect (technical evaluator)

---

KEY MESSAGES
1. Enterprise integration is broken — 67% of IT budgets are consumed by integration maintenance. CloudFlow fixes this.
2. AI isn't a feature. It's the platform. CloudFlow's AI builds, monitors, and heals integrations automatically.
3. Enterprise-grade security and compliance are built in, not bolted on — SOC 2, GDPR, HIPAA, ISO 27001.
4. From first connection to full enterprise deployment: 500+ connectors, 99.99% uptime, and white-glove support.

---

CREATIVE DIRECTION
Tone: Authoritative but human. We talk to practitioners, not procurement. Direct, specific, evidence-driven.
Visual: Clean, blue-dominant. Abstract network/connection motifs. Real customer logos where approved.
Proof Points: Lead with data. Third-party validation (Gartner MQ, G2) and real customer metrics in every asset.

---

TARGET OUTCOMES
- 1,200 net new MQLs across all channels
- 15,000 whitepaper downloads
- 2,000 webinar registrations (May 14 event)
- 420 demo requests
- 34% MQL-to-SQL conversion rate
- $4.2M in sourced pipeline

---

CHANNEL MIX
Paid Search (30%) | Paid Social LinkedIn (25%) | Email Nurture (20%) | Events/Webinar (15%) | Content/SEO (10%)

---

KEY MILESTONES
April 7 — Whitepaper + Assessment launch
April 14 — Blog post + ROI calculator live
May 1 — Newsletter launch
May 14 — Live webinar (target: 2,000 registrations)
June 18 — CloudFlow Summit, San Francisco
July 1 — Q3 refresh: new personas, ABM push
